Configuration.ShortDescription: Advanced per-resource tax and production management with adaptive AI advisor, company browser, auto-tax engine, and dual-mode UI.
Configuration.LongDescription: AdvancedTPM provides granular per-resource tax controls for 50+ resources, real-time production monitoring, a full company browser with efficiency analysis, an auto-tax engine with 6-factor scoring, and an adaptive learning advisor that improves recommendations over time.
